title: Exit Prohibited
embodies: One feedback equation rendered simultaneously in four visual vocabularies — physical oscillation (C1 Wiener), relational oscillation (C2 Bateson), observational regress (C3 Von Foerster), structural displacement (C4 Maturana) — showing that the four stations of Track C are not parallel arguments but one structure at four levels of closure. The prohibited exit: in each domain, the correction mechanism cannot leave the loop it is trying to correct.
